introSection: Cyber Space was a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Barbisan that was previously owned and travelled by UK showmen Richard & Michael Jennings. It has since been scrapped, with the ride's station being used for Derek Charles Slater's Pirate Trail Ghost Train.
fullText: Cyber Space was a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Barbisan that was previously owned and travelled by UK showmen Richard & Michael Jennings. It has since been scrapped, with the ride's station being used for Derek Charles Slater's Pirate Trail Ghost Train.
